headline: Assessing State Street (STT) Valuation After New Principal Funds Servicing Win Draws Investor Attention
summary: State Street (STT) is back in focus after Principal Financial Group selected the company to provide custody, fund accounting and administration services for Principal Funds, spotlighting its broader integrated investment servicing capabilities. See our latest analysis for State Street. These new fund servicing responsibilities arrive at a time when momentum in the stock has been building, with a 90 day share price return of 32.04% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 68.26% from a latest...
